state.output:
<file>
00001| import React from 'react'
00002| import { PrivyProvider } from '@privy-io/react-auth'
00003| import { WagmiProvider as PrivyWagmiProvider } from '@privy-io/wagmi'
00004| import { WagmiProvider } from 'wagmi'
00005| import { wagmiConfig } from '../blockchain/wagmi'
00006| import { QueryClient, QueryClientProvider } from '@tanstack/react-query'
00007| import { config } from '../../config'
00008| import { JSONStringifyBigIntHelper } from '../blockchain/bigint'
00009| 
00010| // Create a single query client instance
00011| const queryClient = new QueryClient({
00012|   defaultOptions: {
00013|     queries: {
00014|       retry: (failureCount, error) => {
00015|         // Don't retry on 4xx errors
00016|         if (error && typeof error === 'object' && 'status' in error && 
00017|             typeof error.status === 'number' && error.status >= 400 && error.status < 500) {
00018|           return false
00019|         }
00020|         return failureCount < 3
00021|       },
00022|       staleTime: 1000 * 60 * 5, // 5 minutes
00023|       refetchOnWindowFocus: false,
00024|       queryKeyHashFn: (key) => {
00025|         return JSON.stringify(key, JSONStringifyBigIntHelper)
00026|       },
00027|     },
00028|   },
00029| })
00030| 
00031| export interface AuthProviderProps {
00032|   children: React.ReactNode
00033| }
00034| 
00035| export const AuthProvider: React.FC<AuthProviderProps> = ({ children }) => {
00036|   // If Privy is not configured, use standard Wagmi with InjectedConnector
00037|   if (!config.privy.appId) {
00038|     return (
00039|       <React.StrictMode>
00040|         <QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>
00041|           <WagmiProvider config={wagmiConfig}>
00042|             {children}
00043|           </WagmiProvider>
00044|         </QueryClientProvider>
00045|       </React.StrictMode>
00046|     )
00047|   }
00048| 
00049|   // Otherwise use Privy + Wagmi
00050|   return (
00051|     <React.StrictMode>
00052|       <QueryClientProvider client={queryClient}>
00053|         <PrivyProvider appId={config.privy.appId!} clientId={config.privy.clientId!}>
00054|           <PrivyWagmiProvider config={wagmiConfig}>
00055|             {children}
00056|           </PrivyWagmiProvider>
00057|         </PrivyProvider>
00058|       </QueryClientProvider>
00059|     </React.StrictMode>
00060|   )
00061| }
00062| 
00063| // Export query client for use in other parts of the app
00064| export { queryClient } 
</file>
